## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project conventions (see `CONTRIBUTING.md`)
- [ ] Tests added / updated
- [ ] `make check` (typecheck + lint + test) passes locally
- [ ] `make format` run
- [ ] Documentation updated where relevant
- [ ] No secrets / sensitive data committed
- [ ] New source files carry the Apache 2.0 header
